metadata.description: Parallax — a spec-driven, blind-coder TDD pipeline for Claude Code with an optional cross-model verifier and human-gated safe completion.

plugins.name: parallax
plugins.description: Parallax — independent paths, one verified result. A spec-driven, parallel, blind-coder TDD pipeline: a maximally concrete read-only spec drives two independent tracks (a test-writer and a blind-coder that never sees the tests); a single whole-seeing arbiter runs the tests and loops until green. An optional cross-model verifier — a read-only structured reviewer chain of non-Claude models — adversarially reviews the spec before the blind tracks and each green slice after. Safety is mechanical, not honour-based: a deterministic blindfold guard fails closed on any cross-track leak (and on an incomplete wall request), finalize/epic gates require committed green receipts and re-derivable raw verdicts, verifier chains accept only read-only reviewers, worker children hold only their own provider credential, paid provider failures are never silently retried, and nothing reaches main without a human. Claude Code provides the slash-command pipeline; Codex provides a skills-only adapter for the same fail-closed workflow (Claude slash commands are not exposed as Codex commands). Releases require a durable independent verifier verdict — the packaging gate refuses a version without one.
